title: 第3周 第6天 — 货币与汇率（Currency & Exchange Rate）
objective: 掌握商务合同中货币与汇率条款的核心词汇，重点理解 denomination（计价货币）、foreign exchange risk（汇率风险）的分担机制，以及 prevailing rate（现行汇率）、spot rate（即期汇率）、hedging（对冲）在合同中的精确含义，能够准确翻译货币计价与汇率换算相关条款。

blocks.html: 上节回顾：上节课学习了税费与扣款核心词汇——withholding tax（预扣税）、gross-up（总额化补偿）、VAT（增值税）、duty（关税）、deduction（扣款）、set-off（抵销）、remit（缴纳）等。今天我们继续第3周支付条款，学习与货币计价和汇率相关的核心术语。
本课主题：跨境商务合同往往涉及多种货币，必须明确用哪种货币计价（denomination）、按什么汇率换算（exchange rate、prevailing rate、spot rate）、汇率波动风险由谁承担（foreign exchange risk、fluctuation）。处理不当将直接导致价款缩水或纠纷。

错题持续攻克（来自 mistakes.md）：
  • gross-up = 总额化（❌ 错误：“增加付款”——gross-up 是补偿被扣缴税款的机制）
  • set-off = 抵销（❌ 错误：“抵扣”——抵扣是税法概念，合同中 set-off 是债务相互折抵）
  • operative provisions = 实质条款（❌ 错误：“执行条款”）
  • held to be = 被裁定为（❌ 错误：“被认为是”——legal hold = 裁定）
货币与汇率条款在跨境服务合同、采购合同、贷款合同中极为常见，以下 12 个术语是翻译此类条款的核心。

rows: contract currency; payment currency; in the currency of; currency of payment
applicable exchange rate; at the exchange rate of; exchange rate published by
n. 面额；计价货币；币种
denomination of the contract; denominated in USD; currency of denomination
currency conversion; conversion into; conversion rate; date of conversion
foreign exchange market; foreign exchange controls; foreign exchange regulations
foreign exchange risk
n. 汇率风险；外汇风险
bear the foreign exchange risk; allocation of foreign exchange risk; assume foreign exchange risk
n. 现行汇率；通行汇率
at the prevailing rate; prevailing rate of exchange; prevailing rate on the payment date
n. 记账本位币；功能货币
the company's functional currency; reporting in the functional currency
n. 即期汇率；现汇汇率
spot rate on the date of payment; spot rate quoted by the bank; at the spot rate
currency hedging; hedging arrangements; hedging against fluctuation
n. 法定货币；法偿货币
legal tender of the country; in legal tender; recognized as legal tender
exchange rate fluctuation; currency fluctuation; fluctuation in the exchange rate

blocks.html: 词源记忆：denomination 来自拉丁语 nomen（名称），意为“命名（金额的）单位”，因此既指钞票“面额”，也指合同“以何种货币命名计价”。hedging 字面是“用树篱围起来”（hedge = 树篱），引申为“设防、规避风险”——通过远期合约等工具锁定汇率，把自己“围”在风险之外。prevailing（现行的）来自 prevail（占优势、普遍存在），指当下市场上“通行的”那个汇率。

rows.en: All amounts payable under this Agreement shall be denominated in USD.
rows.zh: 本协议项下应付的所有款项均应以美元计价。

rows: at the prevailing exchange rate

rows.en: Payment in local currency shall be converted at the prevailing exchange rate on the due date.
rows.zh: 以当地货币支付的款项应按到期日的现行汇率折算。

rows: bear the foreign exchange risk

rows.en: The Buyer shall bear the foreign exchange risk arising from any currency conversion.
rows.zh: 买方应承担因任何货币兑换而产生的汇率风险。

rows: currency conversion

rows.en: Any currency conversion shall be made using the spot rate quoted by the Bank.
rows.zh: 任何货币兑换均应采用该银行报出的即期汇率进行。

rows: at the spot rate on the date of payment

rows.en: The amount shall be calculated at the spot rate on the date of payment.
rows.zh: 该金额应按付款日的即期汇率计算。

rows: exchange rate fluctuation

rows.en: Neither party shall be liable for losses caused by exchange rate fluctuation.
rows.zh: 任何一方均不对汇率波动造成的损失承担责任。

rows: currency of payment

rows.en: The currency of payment under this Agreement shall be the Euro.
rows.zh: 本协议项下的支付货币应为欧元。

rows: legal tender of the country

rows.en: Payment shall be made in the legal tender of the country in which the Services are performed.
rows.zh: 付款应以服务履行地所在国的法定货币进行。

blocks.text: 3a. exchange rate vs. prevailing rate vs. spot rate

rows: 两种货币的兑换比率（泛称）
最通用，需另行约定“哪个时点、谁公布”的汇率
某一时点市场上“通行/普遍适用”的汇率
强调“当时通行”，常与付款日、到期日挂钩
当下即时成交、即时交割的汇率（区别于远期汇率 forward rate）
最精确，常指定“某银行报出的即期汇率”

blocks.html: 实务提示：合同中只写 “at the exchange rate” 是不严谨的，容易引发争议。规范写法须明确时点（on the date of payment / on the due date）+ 来源（quoted by [Bank] / published by [Central Bank]），例如 “at the spot rate quoted by HSBC on the date of payment”。

blocks.text: 3b. denomination vs. functional currency vs. legal tender

blocks.html:
• denomination（计价货币/面额）：合同约定以哪种货币计价的币种，如 “amounts denominated in USD”。这是合同当事人意思自治的结果。
  • functional currency（记账本位币）：会计概念，指某一企业主要经营环境中使用、用于编制财务报表的货币。与合同计价货币不一定相同。
  • legal tender（法定货币）：一国法律强制赋予清偿效力的货币（如人民币是中国境内的 legal tender），债权人不得拒收。这是法律强制属性，不取决于合同约定。

合同常见表述：“All sums shall be denominated and payable in USD, being the agreed currency of payment.”——意思是：所有款项以美元计价并以美元支付，美元为约定的支付货币。

blocks.text: 3c. foreign exchange risk 与 hedging

blocks.html:
问题场景：中国卖方与美国买方签约，合同以美元（denomination = USD）计价 100 万美元。从签约到收款的几个月内，若美元对人民币贬值，卖方换回的人民币会减少——这就是 foreign exchange risk（汇率风险）。

风险分担条款：合同应明确谁承担（bear / assume）汇率波动（fluctuation）的后果。常见做法是约定 “each party bears its own foreign exchange risk”（各自承担汇率风险）。

风险管理工具：hedging（对冲/套期保值）——通过远期外汇合约等金融工具提前锁定汇率，规避未来波动。合同语言：“The Seller may enter into hedging arrangements to manage its foreign exchange risk.”

items.title: 例句 1
items.sentence: All amounts payable under this Agreement shall be denominated in USD, and where any conversion from another currency is required, such conversion shall be made at the spot rate quoted by the Bank on the date of payment.
structure: All amounts payable under this Agreement shall be denominated in USD — 主句一：本协议项下所有应付款项均以美元计价（denominated in = 以……计价）
where any conversion from another currency is required — 条件状语从句：凡需由其他货币兑换时（where = 在……情况下，引导条件）
such conversion shall be made at the spot rate quoted by the Bank on the date of payment — 主句二：该等兑换应按银行于付款日报出的即期汇率进行（quoted by = 由……报价；on the date of payment = 于付款日，明确时点）
items.translation: 本协议项下应付的所有款项均应以美元计价；凡需由其他货币兑换时，该等兑换应按银行于付款日报出的即期汇率进行。

items.title: 例句 2
items.sentence: Each Party shall bear its own foreign exchange risk, and neither Party shall be entitled to any adjustment of the contract price on account of any fluctuation in the exchange rate after the date hereof.
structure: Each Party shall bear its own foreign exchange risk — 主句一：各方自行承担其汇率风险（bear = 承担）
neither Party shall be entitled to any adjustment of the contract price — 主句二：任何一方均无权调整合同价款（be entitled to = 有权……；neither = 两者都不）
on account of any fluctuation in the exchange rate after the date hereof — 原因状语：因本协议日期之后汇率发生任何波动（on account of = 因……原因；hereof = of this Agreement）
items.translation: 各方应自行承担其汇率风险，且任何一方均无权因本协议签订日之后汇率发生任何波动而要求调整合同价款。

items.title: 例句 3
items.sentence: If, on the date of payment, the prevailing rate of exchange differs from that set out herein, the payment shall nonetheless be made in the currency of denomination, and the paying Party may, at its own cost, enter into hedging arrangements.
structure: If, on the date of payment, the prevailing rate of exchange differs from that set out herein — 条件从句：若于付款日现行汇率与本协议所载汇率不同（that = the rate；set out herein = 本协议规定的）
the payment shall nonetheless be made in the currency of denomination — 主句：付款仍应以计价货币进行（nonetheless = 尽管如此、仍然；currency of denomination = 计价货币）
the paying Party may, at its own cost, enter into hedging arrangements — 并列句：付款方可自费安排对冲（may = 可以，授权性用语；at its own cost = 自费；enter into = 订立）
items.translation: 若于付款日现行汇率与本协议所载汇率不同，付款仍应以计价货币进行；付款方可自行承担费用安排套期保值。

blocks.html: 看到英文术语，想一想中文意思，然后点击展开答案：

denomination
面额；计价货币
amounts denominated in USD = 以美元计价的款项
foreign exchange risk
汇率风险；外汇风险
bear the foreign exchange risk = 承担汇率风险
prevailing rate
现行汇率；通行汇率
at the prevailing rate on the due date = 按到期日现行汇率
spot rate
即期汇率；现汇汇率
区别于远期汇率 forward rate
hedging
对冲；套期保值
currency hedging = 货币对冲，提前锁定汇率
functional currency
记账本位币；功能货币
会计概念，编制报表所用货币
legal tender
法定货币；法偿货币
法律强制赋予清偿效力，债权人不得拒收
fluctuation
波动；变动
exchange rate fluctuation = 汇率波动

sections.heading: 5b. 配对选择：看中文选英文

groups.title: 5b. 配对选择：看中文选英文

questions.prompt: 1. 计价货币（合同约定以何币种计价）
questions.explanation: denomination = 面额/计价货币，指合同约定的计价币种；conversion 是“兑换”，fluctuation 是“波动”，均非币种本身

questions.prompt: 2. 即期汇率（当下即时成交的汇率）
questions.explanation: spot rate = 即期汇率，指即时成交即时交割的汇率；prevailing rate 强调“通行”，exchange rate 是泛称

questions.prompt: 3. 对冲/套期保值（锁定汇率规避风险）
questions.explanation: hedging = 对冲/套期保值，通过远期合约等工具锁定汇率；foreign exchange 是“外汇”，conversion 是“兑换”

questions.prompt: 4. 汇率风险（汇率波动带来的损失风险）
options: foreign exchange risk
questions.answer: foreign exchange risk
questions.explanation: foreign exchange risk = 汇率风险；exchange rate 仅指汇率本身，legal tender 是“法定货币”

questions.prompt: 5. 法定货币（法律强制赋予清偿效力的货币）
questions.explanation: legal tender = 法定货币，债权人不得拒收；functional currency 是会计上的“记账本位币”，currency 是泛指“货币”

groups.title: 练习A：术语理解选择
groups.instruction: 根据语境选择最准确的术语。

questions.prompt: 1. 合同写道“All amounts shall be ____ in USD”，意思是所有款项以美元计价，应选：
questions.explanation: denominated in USD = 以美元计价，是合同约定计价货币的标准表述；converted 是“兑换”，hedged 是“对冲”，均不符合“计价”之义

questions.prompt: 2. 合同要求按“付款当日市场上通行的汇率”折算，最贴切的术语是：
questions.explanation: prevailing rate = 现行汇率，强调“当时通行/普遍适用”的汇率；functional currency 是记账本位币，denomination 是计价货币，均非汇率

questions.prompt: 3. 卖方担心收款时美元贬值导致换回的本币减少，这种风险称为：
options: foreign exchange risk
withholding tax
questions.answer: foreign exchange risk
questions.explanation: foreign exchange risk = 汇率风险，指汇率波动带来的损失风险；default interest 是违约利息，withholding tax 是预扣税，均与汇率无关

questions.prompt: 4. 公司为规避未来汇率波动，提前签订远期外汇合约锁定汇率，这种安排叫做：
options: hedging（对冲）
questions.answer: hedging（对冲）
questions.explanation: hedging = 对冲/套期保值，通过金融工具提前锁定汇率规避风险；conversion 只是“兑换”动作，set-off 是债务抵销，与风险管理无关

questions.prompt: 5. 合同约定货币兑换须采用“某银行报出的即期汇率”，“即期汇率”对应：
options: spot rate（即期汇率）
questions.answer: spot rate（即期汇率）
questions.explanation: spot rate = 即期汇率，即时成交即时交割；forward rate 是远期汇率（未来交割），interest rate 是利率，均不对应“即期”

questions.prompt: 6. 某国法律强制赋予人民币在该国境内的清偿效力，债权人不得拒收，人民币在该国是：
questions.explanation: legal tender = 法定货币，由法律强制赋予清偿效力；functional currency 是会计上的记账本位币（企业选择），foreign exchange 是“外汇”概念，均不强调法律强制清偿力

groups.title: 练习B：术语填空
groups.instruction: 根据语境填入最合适的法律英语术语（首字母已给出语境提示）。

questions.prompt: All amounts payable under this Agreement shall be ____ in USD.
questions.explanation: denominated in = 以……计价。denomination（计价货币）的动词形式，是合同约定计价币种的标准用语
hints: 这个词来自 denomination（面额/计价货币）的动词形式
denominated in USD = 以美元计价

questions.prompt: Payment in local currency shall be converted at the ____ exchange rate on the due date.
questions.explanation: prevailing exchange rate = 现行汇率。prevailing 表示“当时通行/普遍适用的”，常与付款日、到期日挂钩
hints: 表示“当时通行的、现行的”
来自 prevail（占优势、普遍存在）

questions.prompt: Each party shall ____ its own foreign exchange risk arising from any currency conversion.
questions.explanation: bear the foreign exchange risk = 承担汇率风险。bear（承担）与 risk 搭配，assume 亦可接受
hints: 表示“承担（风险/责任）”的动词
bear / assume the risk 都是常见搭配

questions.prompt: Any currency ____ shall be made using the spot rate quoted by the Bank.
questions.explanation: currency conversion = 货币兑换/换算。conversion 指把一种货币折算为另一种货币
hints: 表示“兑换、换算、折算”的名词

questions.prompt: The Seller may enter into ____ arrangements to manage its foreign exchange risk.
questions.explanation: hedging arrangements = 对冲/套期保值安排，通过远期合约等工具锁定汇率规避风险
hints: 表示“对冲、套期保值”的名词
字面源自 hedge（树篱），引申为“设防、规避风险”

questions.prompt: Neither party shall be liable for losses caused by exchange rate ____.
questions.explanation: exchange rate fluctuation = 汇率波动。fluctuation 指汇率的上下波动、变动

questions.prompt: Payment shall be made in the legal ____ of the country in which the Services are performed.
questions.explanation: legal tender = 法定货币，是法律强制赋予清偿效力的货币，债权人不得拒收
hints: legal ____ 是“法定货币”的固定搭配
tender 在此意为“偿付（货币）”

groups.title: 练习C：句子填空（选择）
groups.instruction: 选择最合适的词或词组填入空白处。

questions.prompt: 1. The amount shall be calculated at the ____ on the date of payment.
questions.explanation: at the spot rate on the date of payment = 按付款日的即期汇率，是货币换算条款的标准表述；functional currency 与 legal tender 均非汇率

questions.prompt: 2. The contract price is ____ in Euro and shall be payable in the same currency.
questions.explanation: denominated in Euro = 以欧元计价；converted 是“兑换”，levied 是“征收（税款）”，均不符合“计价”语境

questions.prompt: 3. Each party shall ____ its own ____ arising from any currency conversion.
questions.explanation: bear its own foreign exchange risk = 自行承担汇率风险，是汇率风险分担条款的标准表述；remit withholding tax 是缴纳预扣税，waive right of set-off 是放弃抵销权，均与货币兑换无关

questions.prompt: 4. The Buyer may enter into ____ to protect itself against exchange rate ____.
questions.explanation: hedging arrangements 针对 exchange rate fluctuation（汇率波动）进行对冲，逻辑契合；payment schedule/deduction 与 grace period/penalty 均不构成“对冲—波动”的对应

groups.title: 翻译练习一：英译中
groups.instruction: 将以下条款翻译为中文，完成后点击“提交 AI 批改”获取详细批改。

questions.source: All amounts payable under this Agreement shall be denominated in USD, and any conversion from another currency shall be made at the spot rate quoted by the Bank on the date of payment.
questions.reference: 本协议项下应付的所有款项均应以美元计价，任何由其他货币进行的兑换，均应按银行于付款日报出的即期汇率进行。

rubric.note: denominated in = 以……计价，不是“兑换成”；这里指合同计价货币

rubric.en: conversion from another currency
rubric.ideal: 由其他货币进行的兑换
rubric.note: conversion = 兑换/换算/折算，是货币换算的专用词

rubric.en: spot rate quoted by the Bank
rubric.note: spot rate = 即期汇率（区别于远期汇率 forward rate），不可译为“现场汇率”；quoted by = 由……报价
date of payment = 付款日，明确汇率适用的时点，是货币换算条款的关键

questions.source: Each Party shall bear its own foreign exchange risk, and neither Party shall be entitled to any adjustment of the contract price on account of any fluctuation in the exchange rate.
questions.reference: 各方应自行承担其汇率风险，且任何一方均无权因汇率发生任何波动而要求调整合同价款。

rubric.en: bear its own foreign exchange risk
rubric.note: foreign exchange risk = 汇率风险/外汇风险，是完整术语，不能简化为“外汇”；bear = 承担

rubric.en: be entitled to any adjustment of the contract price
accept: 有权要求调整合同价格
rubric.note: be entitled to = 有权……；adjustment of the contract price = 调整合同价款，注意“合同价款”须完整译出

rubric.en: on account of any fluctuation
rubric.note: on account of = 因……原因，不是“关于”；fluctuation = 波动/变动
neither Party = 两方中任何一方都不，译为“任何一方均不”最规范

groups.title: 翻译练习二：中译英
groups.instruction: 将以下中文条款翻译为英文合同用语，完成后点击“提交 AI 批改”获取详细批改。

questions.source: 本协议项下的支付货币应为人民币，凡需货币兑换的，应按付款日中国银行报出的现行汇率折算；各方自行承担汇率波动风险。
questions.reference: The currency of payment under this Agreement shall be RMB; where any currency conversion is required, it shall be converted at the prevailing rate of exchange quoted by the Bank of China on the date of payment; each Party shall bear its own foreign exchange risk arising from exchange rate fluctuation.

rubric.ideal: the currency of payment shall be
rubric.note: currency of payment = 支付货币/结算货币，不可用 money；shall = 法律义务用词

rubric.ideal: where any currency conversion is required
accept: if any currency conversion is required
in case of any currency conversion
rubric.note: currency conversion = 货币兑换；where 引导条件从句是合同常用结构

rubric.ideal: converted at the prevailing rate of exchange
rubric.note: prevailing rate of exchange = 现行汇率，不能写成 current price；converted at = 按……折算

rubric.en: 自行承担汇率波动风险
rubric.ideal: bear its own foreign exchange risk arising from exchange rate fluctuation
accept: bear the foreign exchange risk of exchange rate fluctuation
rubric.note: foreign exchange risk = 汇率风险；exchange rate fluctuation = 汇率波动；bear = 承担

blocks.html:
常见错误预防：
  • spot rate ≠ 现场汇率：spot rate 是金融术语“即期汇率”（即时成交即时交割），与“远期汇率 forward rate”相对，不可按字面译为“现场汇率”。
  • denomination ≠ 仅指“面额”：在货币条款中 denomination 多指“计价货币/币种”，如 currency of denomination = 计价货币；按字面译成“面额”会偏离合同语境。
  • functional currency ≠ 合同计价货币：functional currency 是会计概念（企业编制报表所用货币），与合同约定的 currency of payment / denomination 不一定相同，翻译时不要混为一谈。
  • legal tender ≠ 合法货币：legal tender 特指“法定货币/法偿货币”（法律强制清偿效力），不是泛泛的“合法货币”；债权人不得拒收 legal tender。
  • 汇率条款须写明“时点 + 来源”：只写 at the exchange rate 不严谨，须明确 on the date of payment（时点）+ quoted by [Bank]（来源），否则易生争议。

sections.heading: 8. 今日小结
sections.html:
第3周 第6天 — 货币与汇率核心要点

知识点核心内容
计价货币denomination / denominated in USD = 以美元计价；明确合同currency of payment（支付货币）
汇率三兄弟exchange rate（汇率，泛称）vs. prevailing rate（现行/通行汇率）vs. spot rate（即期汇率，区别于远期）
货币换算conversion 须写明“时点（on the date of payment）+ 来源（quoted by [Bank]）”，否则易生争议
风险分担foreign exchange risk（汇率风险）由谁 bear；fluctuation（汇率波动）通常约定各自承担
风险管理hedging（对冲/套期保值）——通过远期合约等工具提前锁定汇率
三类货币概念denomination（计价货币，合同约定）/ functional currency（记账本位币，会计概念）/ legal tender（法定货币，法律强制清偿力）

下节预告（第3周 第7天）：本周复习日——集中巩固第3周支付与对价条款全部要点：consideration（对价）、payment terms（付款条件）、interest（利息）、withholding tax（预扣税）、currency 与 exchange rate（货币与汇率）等核心术语，不引入新知识点。
